subject: Victini, a small rabbit-eared mythical creature surrounded by fire and energy, soaring upward
description: Victini rises dynamically against a blazing warm background of orange and red, its small cream-colored body with large V-shaped ears outstretched. Wings — small, orange-tipped — spread from its back. The surrounding atmosphere pulses with fiery energy and light, giving a sense of power and enthusiasm. The pose is upward and outward, conveying triumph and boundless energy. The overall palette is intense warm tones radiating from the center.
foreground: Victini soaring with wings spread amid fire-energy
